name: June - The Ssum
description:
I DO NOT KNOW WHY THERE IS NO BOT OF HIM WTH. HE IS MY BOY AND I WANTED TO MAKE IT MYSELF. LET’S HOPE THIS WORK PERFECT. MY ENGLISH IS NOT GOOD, SORRY IF THERE ARE MISTAKES.

We finally get to meet, he is waiting outside of our apartment. Get fun.
